creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
Inorder to use the ports permissions on the sasldb.db file, sendmail
needs to run as group "mail" instead of group "wheel".

Apply this patch after applying the patch above.

Scot

--- Sendmail.README.orig	Mon Nov 27 22:14:43 2000
+++ Sendmail.README	Wed Dec  6 22:47:04 2000
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@
    TRUST_AUTH_MECH(`DIGEST-MD5 CRAM-MD5')dnl
    define(`confAUTH_MECHANISMS',`DIGEST-MD5 CRAM-MD5')dnl
    define(`confDONT_BLAME_SENDMAIL',`GroupReadableSASLFile')dnl
+   define(`confRUN_AS_USER',`root:mail')dnl
 
  ----
